taxonomy.rationale: Synthetic founder/maker taxonomy showcasing tokenpayback's full range.

categories.label: Ship feature
categories.description: Building or completing a product feature end-to-end.

categories.label: Infra & deploy
categories.description: CI/CD, env, auth, scripts, deploy work.

categories.label: Design & decks
categories.description: PPT/Keynote, pitch deck, slide rework, visual mockups.

categories.label: Video & clip
categories.description: Short-form video edit, captions, TikTok/Reels prep.

categories.label: Copy & content
categories.description: Blog post, landing copy, email sequence, tweet thread.

categories.label: Market research
categories.description: Competitor scan, user research synthesis, market sizing.

categories.label: Comms & docs
categories.description: Resume edit, cover letter, board update, exec ghostwriting.

categories.label: Life logistics
categories.description: Trip planning, food, finance, household, personal admin.

classification.summary: Built magic-link auth + email cooldown for the new pricing page.
Implemented CSV import pipeline with progress events.
Fixed Stripe webhook race that double-charged on retries.
Wired GitHub Actions cron + Vercel preview deploys.
Set up Sentry + Datadog tracing on the API.
Surveyed 6 dashboards in the AI ROI space, wrote diff matrix.
Talked through v2 multi-tenant data model tradeoffs.
Redrew 12 slides for Series A pitch — narrative + charts.
Built 5 board update slides with metric callouts.
Cut a 60-second founder vlog with captions and B-roll.
Trimmed a product demo, added subtitles + intro card.
Drafted a launch announcement email — 3 variants A/B.
Rewrote landing hero copy + sub-headline against ICP feedback.

signals.label: Yield Variance
signals.why: Share of $ going to value-added work. Drop = silent quality regression (model swap, prompt rot, retrieval drift).

signals.label: Rate Variance
signals.why: $ per value-added session. Spike = model-mix drift (Haiku → Sonnet → Opus) or vendor price hike.

signals.label: Efficiency Variance
signals.why: Tokens per value-added session. Spike = verbosity, over-long CoT, retry bloat.
